summary: Frontend-only e2e testing of LB Mecânica SPA with localStorage fallback. 11/12 flows verified working; 1 warning on Veículos creation that needs verification. CORS errors to https://lb-mecanica.onrender.com are expected and the app transparently falls back to localStorage as designed.

ui_bugs.issue: Veículo record not visible in the list immediately after clicking Salvar in the new-vehicle modal. Could be a placeholder-matching issue in the test script OR the form needs a required field (e.g., ano/cliente) that wasn't auto-filled. Manual verification recommended.

issues: All 8 stat cards render correctly (OS Abertas, Em Andamento, Finalizadas, Saldo do Caixa, Entradas, Saídas, Clientes, Veículos) with good dark theme contrast and orange/gold accents as specified.

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. A <span> is being rendered inside a native <option> element somewhere in the sidebar/select hierarchy. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up (plain text only inside <option>).

flows_verified.login_with_local_fallback: PASS — 'Acesso liberado (modo local)' toast shown; redirects to /dashboard; lb_token and lb_user set in localStorage
flows_verified.clientes_create: PASS — new client appears in list
flows_verified.veiculos_create: WARN — record not visible after save (see ui_bugs)
flows_verified.os_create: PASS — cliente/veículo selects populated from local data and OS saved
flows_verified.sidebar_navigation: PASS — nav-dashboard, nav-empresa, nav-clientes, nav-veiculos, nav-os, nav-servicos, nav-pecas, nav-financeiro, nav-fechamento, nav-backup all route correctly

flows_not_tested: OS: adding serviço and peça from catalog + total auto-update (basic OS save was verified, but line-item addition was not exercised)
Financeiro: saída entry + saldo update math
action_items: Investigate Veículos creation flow: confirm that creating a vehicle with Placa + Modelo + Cliente via the modal actually persists and displays. May be a missing required field or a UI rendering bug.
Fix Layout.jsx hydration warning — remove <span> from inside native <option> elements (use plain text or switch to a custom dropdown).
Manually exercise the flows listed in 'flows_not_tested' (Orçamento → convert to OS, OS line-items with auto total, saída/saldo math, PDF export, logo upload).
critical_code_review_comments: API_BASE is hardcoded to https://lb-mecanica.onrender.com in src/services/api.js — acceptable per product choice (frontend-only SPA with localStorage fallback), but consider moving to an env var for future flexibility.

axios timeout of 12s per request multiplied across ~8 resources on each page load produces many simultaneous CORS failures in the console. Consider a short-circuit flag (e.g., after first failure, set a session flag to skip future API calls) to keep the console clean and speed up page loads in local-only mode.
Dashboard visible ~1s but OS/Veículo pages load slower due to 12s timeouts on every fetch. UX impact is minor because data loads from localStorage after, but perceived sluggishness could be improved.
Hydration warning in Layout.jsx (<span> inside <option>) should be fixed — React 19 will be stricter.
test_credentials: lbmecanica / eaixuxu (local fallback, since API is unreachable / CORS blocked)
seed_data_creation: Created via UI during test run: 1 Empresa record, 1 Cliente 'Cliente Teste', 1 Serviço 'Troca de óleo', 1 Peça 'Filtro de óleo', 1 OS, 1 Entrada financeira. All persisted to browser localStorage under keys lb_* (cleared each browser session).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend URL: https://lb-oficina-web.preview.emergentagent.com. Login: lbmecanica / eaixuxu (expect 'Acesso liberado (modo local)' toast — the remote API is CORS-blocked and the app uses localStorage fallback, which is the intended design). All data-testids listed in the request are correct. Priority gaps to cover next: (1) Veículos create (possible regression), (2) Orçamento → convert-to-OS flow, (3) OS line-items + auto total, (4) jsPDF export buttons, (5) logo upload in Empresa. Console is noisy with CORS errors — these are expected and not bugs.
rca_of_the_issue: Veículos WARN: unable to confirm the created vehicle appears in the list. Likely causes: (a) the modal requires an additional field (ano/marca) that my generic 'input 1' and 'input 2' fill logic did not satisfy, causing a silent validation failure, or (b) there is a legitimate bug where the save does not refresh the list. A manual click-through will distinguish these. Recommend main agent open /veiculos, click veiculo-new, fill all fields manually, and watch for the new record. If the record does not appear, check Veiculos.jsx save handler for a missing setVeiculos() / refresh call after local.create().
